title: AI YouTube Automation: How to Start a YouTube Channel With AI
summary: A comprehensive video walkthrough of end-to-end YouTube channel automation using AI tools, covering research, scripting, avatar generation, editing, and publishing. The workflow integrates ChatGPT, Claude, VidIQ, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Descript, and Opus Clip to produce a complete video in 20 minutes.
